channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Xbox’s weirdest studio is on a roll
item.description: For a while there, it seemed like Double Fine might be struggling under the Microsoft corporate umbrella. The game studio led by Tim Schafer is beloved for offbeat titles like Brütal Legend and Broken Age, but after being acquired by Microsoft in 2019, its only new release for years was a long-awaited sequel to Psychonauts. […]

item.title: Invincible season 5: release window, likely cast, and what else we know about the Prime Video show's return
item.description: Invincible season 5 is expected to premiere in early 2027 — here are the key details we know ahead of its eventual launch.

item.title: Où en est CactUs Lock, l’antivol vélo qui pue le cadavre ?
item.description: Présente pour la seconde année consécutive au salon Vélo In Paris, la marque CactUs Lock, fondée par la chimiste Aïko Leroux, a depuis fait son petit bout de chemin. Un an après, où en est l’antivol qui libère une odeur de cadavre une fois coupé ? Frandroid fait le bilan.

item.title: Too many subscriptions, worse products, AI, 'hurtful' algorithms, 'spy' devices: nearly half of Gen Z want to live in the past due to the trappings of modern tech
item.description: In a new NBC News survey 47% of those aged 18-29 say they would rather be living in the past.

item.title: Vous avez des panneaux solaires ? L’État va racheter 4 fois moins cher votre électricité
item.description: Le gouvernement s'apprête à bouleverser l'économie des panneaux solaires résidentiels. Un projet d'arrêté, soumis au Conseil Supérieur de l'Énergie début avril, prévoit de réduire à 1,1 centime le tarif de rachat du surplus et de supprimer la prime à l'autoconsommation pour toutes les petites installations. De quoi rendre la revente d'électricité quasi-inexistante et pousser les particuliers vers l'autoconsommation totale....

item.title: On est montés à bord de l’Aion RT Super : la révolution de la batterie interchangeable à 11 000 € qui se recharge en 99 secondes en Chine
item.description: La nouvelle Aion RT Super embarque la technologie d’échange de batterie CATL « Choco-SEB » : 99 secondes pour repartir avec un plein d’énergie, un Cx de 0,208 et un prix d’entrée de 11 088 euros en location de batterie. Nous l’avons découverte en concession à Shenzhen.

item.title: Sho Miyake answers life’s greatest questions
item.description: Acclaimed Japanese director Sho Miyake has arrived in the States. He's brought with him two feature films: Small, Slow But Steady and Two Seasons, Two Strangers, a pair of naturalistic portraits that deal with the uneasy human desire to relate to other people. Seclusion and unease are bedrocks to Miyake's growing filmography. "I like these […]

item.title: The most exciting laptop I’ve seen in forever
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 125, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, send me cereal recommendations, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about NASA seamstresses and friction and Muskism and scooters, highlighting […]

item.title: I tested Polaroid’s kitschy square-format printer — it’s an addictive way to print and frame your smartphone snaps
item.description: An instant printer and frame for phone photos, the Polaroid Hi-Print 3x3 is a charming way to get more from your camera roll.

item.title: Engadget review recap: DJI Osmo Pocket 4, Recteq X-Fire Pro and Alienware 27 QD-OLED
item.description:
Engadget’s hottest review roundup truly has it all this week: a new pocket cam, a 2-in-1 smart grill, a pair of drones and a pricey skinny vac. And that’s before we even get to the highly capable gaming display that will only set you back $350. Read on to catch up on the reviews you might’ve missed over the last two weeks as we prepare for another slate of big events next month. DJI Osmo Pocket 4
DJI’s Osmo Pocket cameras have become a staple of Engadget’s live event coverage over the last few years. They’re convenient, compact and product high-quality footage when speed matters. Contributin...

item.title: Best Apps for Focus (2026): Focus Friend, Forest, Focus Traveller
item.description: Distractions? What distractions? Here are our recommendations for apps that help you stay focused on the task at hand.

item.title: iPhone loyalty just hit a new high with only 3.6% of iOS users thinking of switching — but here's why I'm never ditching Android
item.description: iPhone owners are more committed than ever to the Apple ecosystem, but I'm sticking with Google.

item.title: Ce SSD portable 1 To compatible MagSafe voit son prix chuter après une brutale hausse
item.description: Comme pour de nombreux SSD récemment, le prix du Lexar ES5 de 1 To avait nettement augmenté. Mais en ce moment, ce SSD portable compatible MagSafe est affiché en promotion à 159,98 euros au lieu de 169,99 euros sur Amazon.
